body_txt: Sunhats are often used as fashion statements and are often accompanied by other accessories — belts, ribbons, earrings, or even a colour-coded outfit. In many cases, she'll often adjust her hat, being concerned about how it makes her look as a Proper Lady . Many an Ojou dons this sort of hat. It's also common amongst similarly rich and bored housewives. This trope can also overlap with Rich Bitch , Upper-Class Twit , and the tropes of Fashion and Modeling Tropes . Essentially Always Female , though there are rare male examples. It could be thrown in Wholesome Crossdresser . Often paired with a Sundress of Innocence . The other term for this is a " picture hat ".
